title: AgentPattern
description: A formalized behavior pattern in the Agent Mind registry

description.description: What this pattern does and why it exists

capability_type.description: Which F3 capability type this pattern governs

authority_level.description: F4 authority level. LOW=automated, MEDIUM=act+notify, HIGH=draft for approval

industry_scope.description: Which industries this applies to. ['ALL'] means universal.

size_fit.description: Which company size tiers this applies to

trigger.description: Condition that activates this pattern. Plain English or pseudocode.

logic.description: What the agent does when triggered. Steps or decision rules.

escalation.description: Who receives escalation and under what conditions

output_format.description: What the pattern produces: recommendation, draft, notification, action, report

ground_truth_check.description: How to validate output matches user perception. The F19 quality gate.

source_frameworks.description: Which F1-F27 frameworks this pattern instantiates. e.g. ['F4', 'F17', 'F27']

source_session.description: Date (YYYY-MM-DD) when this pattern was first formalized

correction_history.description: Log of human corrections that refined this pattern

promotion_criteria.description: What must be true before promoting to the next maturity level

last_validated.description: Date (YYYY-MM-DD) this pattern was last validated against real output

false_done_incidents.description: Count of times this pattern declared success while user perceived failure
